message:
fix: production-quality SQL, shell parsing, and WebSocket safety

- PRAGMA case_sensitive_like = ON: LIKE queries no longer match wrong
  case (e.g., readdir("foo") won't return "Foo/bar" entries)
- escapeLike: paths containing % or _ no longer break LIKE queries
  (e.g., "100%done.txt" won't match "100xdone.txt")
- parseCommand handles backslash escapes: echo hello\ world → "hello world"
- splitPipeline/splitChain handle \|, \;, \&& as literal characters
- splitPipeline uses forward-only || detection (fixes \| followed by |)
- wc respects flags with empty/piped input: true | wc -l → "0" not "0 0 0"
- handleIndexInvalidate normalizes paths before R2 key construction
- WebSocket send() wrapped in try-catch to survive disconnected clients
- normalizePath exported for use by workspace index invalidation
